page: Microsoft Azure B2s is a burstable virtual machine belonging to the BS family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor operating at 2.6 GHz with an x86_64 architecture. The server features 2 vCPUs derived from 2 physical cores with 1 thread per core, paired with 4.0 GB of system memory, yielding 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It includes 8 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage.

Performance benchmarks indicate that the B2s is designed for low-intensity workloads. The server scored 1246.18 on stress-ng single-core and 2461.48 on multi-core CPU tests, placing both in the bottom 25% of tested hardware. Memory bandwidth tests showed 178.34 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 22.46 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. Geekbench scores further confirm this positioning, with a single-core score of 1059.0 and a multi-core score of 1922.0. However, the system achieved an average rating in LLM inference text generation using a small 135M model, reaching 92.32 tokens per second.

Due to its burstable CPU allocation, the B2s offers a highly cost-efficient profile for environments that do not require continuous full CPU utilization. The primary tradeoff is the performance limitation under sustained workloads, as evidenced by its lower benchmark scores in multi-threaded decompression and database operations. This server is best suited for light workloads such as small web servers, development and testing environments, low-traffic databases, and microservices that experience periodic bursts of activity.
description: Microsoft Azure B2s is a burstable virtual machine from the BS family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 2 vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and 8 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server is designed for cost efficiency in low-utilization environments. Benchmark results place its processing and memory performance primarily in the lower tiers, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 2461.48 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 1922.0. However, it maintains average performance in text generation for small language models. The B2s is highly suitable for light workloads, including development environments, small web servers, and microservices that require burstable CPU capabilities rather than sustained high-performance computing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure B2s is a burstable virtual machine featuring 2 vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor, optimized for cost-effective, low-utilization workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure B2s is a burstable virtual machine with 2 vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor, designed for light workloads.
tagline: A cost-effective burstable virtual machine with dual Intel Xeon cores and premium storage capability for light, variable workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 2.6 GHz Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with 2 vCPUs
Equipped with 4.0 GB of system memory and 8 GB of local storage
Burstable CPU allocation designed for variable, low-utilization workloads
Supports Premium Storage for enhanced disk performance options
Best suited for development environments, small web servers, and microservices
